## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Telemetry/schema change

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build GridShare.slnx`
- [ ] `dotnet test GridShare.slnx`
- [ ] CLI run checked, if relevant
- [ ] API/dashboard checked, if relevant
- [ ] Telemetry output checked, if relevant

## Architecture Checklist

- [ ] Domain remains infrastructure-free
- [ ] Market logic stays decoupled from simulation and adapters
- [ ] Ledger append-only behavior is preserved
- [ ] Pricing/settlement assumptions are documented
- [ ] Telemetry schema changes are documented

## Screenshots or Telemetry

Add dashboard screenshots, sample telemetry rows, or API payloads when useful.
